title: poopool
description: Additional mobs, updated mob mechanics, & cat_jam. Also comes with voice chat, essential & performance mods.
body:
# Poopool

This pack has some absolute essential mods like cat_jam, Fox Friend & PatPat. Which incase you don't know are mods that add to existing pets/mobs in the game. This pack includes additional mob mods to have a diverse experience. Structures such as dungeons and other fun toys may appear in your world as well.

This pack also includes some optimization mods to increase the performance of the game as do many modpack these days. **This mod pack includes [essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential).** You can use [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) as a server replacement if wanted.
